authors.name: Accelerate Health Editorial
authors.bio: The Accelerate Health editorial team covers pharmaceutical science, sexual health, and drug delivery innovation.

authors.name: Dr. James Rothwell
authors.bio: Dr. Rothwell is a physician-scientist focused on men's health and pharmacokinetics of PDE5 inhibitors.

medicalReviewers.name: Dr. Elena Vasquez
medicalReviewers.title: Board-Certified Urologist
medicalReviewers.bio: Dr. Vasquez specializes in erectile dysfunction, male sexual medicine, and evidence-based PDE5 inhibitor therapy.
